title: King Kelly of the U.S.A.
writer: George C. Bertholon, Howard Higgin, David Silverstein
actors: Guy Robertson, Edgar Kennedy, Irene Ware
plot: A theatrical troupe headed by a flashy showman finds itself in the tiny--and bankrupt--kingdom of Belgardia. The showman falls in love with the daughter of the dotty king, who has promised her to another. Complications ensue.
